notes: Fixed benchmark for the Meta-Harness loop. MetaHarnessCoordinator fires each entry via in-process tunnelRunWizard against a candidate harness-content bundle, then scores land-rate (landing-ledger join) vs context cost (DebugTunnelWizardResult.inputTokens). Entries flagged holdout:true are used ONLY by the keep-bar for PR-eligibility (the proposer never sees benchmark cases anyway — it reads the trace corpus). Goals are deliberately OFF the saturated avoid_list and span difficulties so the frontier reflects real diversity. Keep this set SMALL + FAST (L1-heavy) so a full campaign stays within campaign_usd_cap. ASCII only.

difficulty_definitions.L1: Single view / static content. One wizard turn.
difficulty_definitions.L2: State mgmt, 2+ screens, one framework primitive. 1-2 turns.

entries.goal: A tide clock mini-app: enter today's high-tide time and it draws a 12h25m circular dial with a moving marker showing how far into the current tide cycle we are, plus a text label 'rising' or 'falling'.
A box-breathing pacer: an expanding/contracting square animates 4s inhale, 4s hold, 4s exhale, 4s hold, with a small cycle counter. Start/stop button. No sound.
A WCAG color-contrast checker: two color pickers (text + background), show the contrast ratio and PASS/FAIL badges for AA and AAA at normal and large text sizes.
A spoken-free interval workout timer: define a list of work/rest intervals, then run them with a big countdown and a color flip (green=work, blue=rest), auto-advancing through the list.

A bill-splitter that handles uneven splits: enter a total and per-person line items, it computes each person's share plus a proportional tip and a rounding adjustment so the parts sum exactly to the total.
A single-board kanban with three columns (To do / Doing / Done), drag cards between columns, add/edit/delete cards, and persist the board to localStorage so it survives reload.
A live microphone spectrogram: request mic access, run an AnalyserNode FFT, and scroll a colored frequency-vs-time canvas. Pause/resume button. Degrade gracefully if mic is denied.
A two-pane markdown outliner: left pane is an editable markdown textarea, right pane live-renders it, and a collapsible heading tree is derived from the headings. Persist to localStorage.
A 2D gravity sandbox on canvas: click to drop bodies with an initial velocity drag-vector, then integrate Newtonian gravity so they orbit/collide. Reset button and a body counter.

A tile-map editor + player: paint a grid with a small tile palette (grass/wall/water), save the map to localStorage, then switch to play mode where a character walks the grid with collision against walls.
A memory match (concentration) card game: a 4x4 grid of face-down cards, flip two to find matching pairs, track moves and matched pairs, win when all matched, with a restart button.
entries._note: Component-loading: matches card/board web-components so component-reuse-hints + web-components layers render substantially, unlike simple utilities. Saturated genre = reliable landing.

entries.goal: A Connect Four game for two players on the same device: a 7-column by 6-row board, click a column to drop a disc, alternate red/yellow turns, detect 4-in-a-row (horizontal/vertical/diagonal) and declare the winner, with a reset button.
entries._note: Board-game: loads board/grid components (held-out for the keep-bar gate).

entries.goal: A tic-tac-toe game for two players on the same device: a 3x3 grid, alternate X/O turns, detect the winner or a draw, show whose turn it is, and a new-game button.
entries._note: Board-game, very reliable landing; loads board components.
